onboarding.enterDisplayName: Please enter a Display Name for your wallet. This will be visible when you update product statuses.

home.heroFooter: Every fruit traced from farm to table.
home.whySubtitle: Three pillars that make our blockchain marketplace stand apart from the rest.
home.pillar1Desc: Every harvest is verified on the Sepolia blockchain. Immutable, transparent, and trustworthy — from the orchard to your table.
home.pillar2Desc: From farm to table in hours, not days. Our integrated logistics engine ensures every item arrives at peak ripeness.
home.pillar3Desc: Real-time stock syncing via automated smart contracts. Warehouse, shelf, and sales data — all connected on one dashboard.
home.productCatalogDesc: Farm-fresh produce, verified on the Ethereum blockchain. Every item is traceable from origin to shelf.
home.ctaDesc: From Vietnamese orchards to your doorstep — every transaction is immutably recorded on the Ethereum blockchain.
home.faq1q: How does blockchain verify my fruit?
home.faq1a: Every product is registered on-chain with a unique ID. Each status update (harvest → transit → delivery) is an immutable transaction, giving you a tamper-proof record of origin and handling.
home.faq2a: We support MetaMask, Brave Wallet, Coinbase Wallet, and any WalletConnect-compatible wallet on the Ethereum Sepolia testnet.
home.faq3a: Only supply chain data is stored on-chain. Personal info like delivery addresses are stored in a secure database and never exposed to the blockchain.
home.faq4a: When logistics marks a batch as 'Delivered', our system auto-updates warehouse stock. Staff can then move items to display shelves and record sales.
home.footerDesc: Blockchain-verified fruit marketplace with real-time traceability and inventory management. Built for VKU — Vietnam-Korea University.
home.footerCopyright: All rights reserved. © 2026. Designed and Developed by Lê Nhật Huy (23IT102) & Nguyễn Thị Thùy Tiến (23IT273) - Vietnam-Korea University (VKU). Contact: hydrex.129@gmail.com
